content.fact_text: Implemented the Validation Interface Suite for the Catalog and Inventory microservice using Zod. Provides strict structural and domain invariant validation for product and inventory operations.

provenance_data.behaviour: Provides robust, schema-driven validation for product creation and inventory adjustments. Ensures data integrity and sanitization before domain processing. No external network I/O; utilizes standard Zod library.
provenance_data.utility: Provides standardized, type-safe request validation and PII redaction utilities for the catalog and inventory controller layer.
